{{Quote|When the Thig Brothers came lookin' for Jodo, they found him waitin' in the Red Shadow—that's a bistro on Taboon, a slag heap of a planet where nobody but 'Nessies would ever live.|[[Spurch Goa]], to [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] and [[Dyyz Nataz]]|<ref name="AHF" />}}
'''Taboon''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Aweris system]]. It shared its name with the [[Taboon hardwood]]. [[Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] [[Bogga's palace|palace]] was on [[Vo Dasha]], a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] Taboon.

{{Planet-stub}}
